arabicText: اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ عِبَادَ اللَّهِ وَاعْلَمُوا أَنَّ الْآخِرَةَ هِيَ الدَّارُ الْبَاقِيَةُ
englishTranslation: Fear Allah, O servants of Allah, and know that the Hereafter is the everlasting abode.
wolofTranslationStandard: Ragalal Yàlla yaw jami Yàlla yi, te xam ne àllaxira mooy kër gu yàgg ga.
wolofalAjamiScript: رَجَلَلْ يَٚlَّ يَوْ جَمِ يَٚlَّ يِ تِ خَمْ نِ اَلَّخِرَ مُيْ كِࣺرْ جُ يَقْ جَ

arabicText: وَأَقِيمُوا الصَّلَاةَ وَآتُوا الزَّكَاةَ وَتَرَاحَمُوا فِيمَا بَيْنَكُمْ
latinTransliteration: Wa aqīmuṣ-ṣalāta wa ātuz-zakāta wa tarāḥamū fīmā baynakum
englishTranslation: And establish prayer, give charity, and show mutual mercy among yourselves.
wolofTranslationStandard: Taxawal julli, joxe zakat, te yërmënde nekk ci seen biir sa sùnek.
wolofalAjamiScript: تَخَوَلْ جُلِّ جُخِ زَكَاة تِ يِٜrْمِينْدِ نِكَّ سِ سِينْ بِيرْ سَ سُنِكْ

arabicText: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَأْمُرُ بِالْعَدْلِ وَالْإِحْسَانِ وَإِيتَاءِ ذِي الْقُرْبَى
latinTransliteration: Inna-llāha ya'muru bil-‘adli wal-iḥsāni wa ītā'i dhil-qurbā
englishTranslation: Indeed, Allah commands justice, benevolence, and giving to relatives.
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg dëgg, Yàlla dafa digle jub, baax, ak joxe ci say bokk.
wolofalAjamiScript: دِٜجّ دِٜجّ يَٚlَّ دَفَ دِجْلِ جُبْ بَآخْ اَكْ جُخِ سِ سَيْ بُكِّ

arabicText: فَاذْكُرُوا اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ يَذْكُرْكُمْ وَاشْكُرُوهُ عَلَى نِعَمِهِ يَزِدْكُمْ
englishTranslation: So remember Allah the Great, He will remember you; and thank Him for His favors, He will increase you.
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuddeel sa Boroom mu rëy ma mu tudd la, te sant ko ci xéwal yi ngir mu yokk la.
wolofalAjamiScript: تُدِّيلْ سَ بُرُومْ مُ رِي مَ مُ تُدْ لَ تِ سَنْتْ كُ سِ خِيوَلْ يِ نْجِرْ مُ يُكِّ لَ

arabicText: اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ عِبَادَ اللَّهِ وَاعْلَمُوا أَنَّ الْآخِرَةَ هِيَ الدَّارُ الْبَاقِيَةُ [5]
englishTranslation: Fear Allah, O servants of Allah, and know that the Hereafter is the everlasting abode. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ragalal Yàlla yaw jami Yàlla yi, te xam ne àllaxira mooy kër gu yàgg ga. (Wers 5)
wolofalAjamiScript: رَجَلَلْ يَٚlَّ يَوْ جَمِ يَٚlَّ يِ تِ خَمْ نِ اَلَّخِرَ مُيْ كِࣺرْ جُ يَقْ جَ [5]

arabicText: وَأَقِيمُوا الصَّلَاةَ وَآتُوا الزَّكَاةَ وَتَرَاحَمُوا فِيمَا بَيْنَكُمْ [6]
latinTransliteration: Wa aqīmuṣ-ṣalāta wa ātuz-zakāta wa tarāḥamū fīmā baynakum (6)
englishTranslation: And establish prayer, give charity, and show mutual mercy among yourselves. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Taxawal julli, joxe zakat, te yërmënde nekk ci seen biir sa sùnek. (Wers 6)
wolofalAjamiScript: تَخَوَلْ جُلِّ جُخِ زَكَاة تِ يِٜrْمِينْدِ نِكَّ سِ سِينْ بِيرْ سَ سُنِكْ [6]

latinTransliteration: Inna-llāha ya'muru bil-‘adli wal-iḥsāni wa ītā'i dhil-qurbā (7)
englishTranslation: Indeed, Allah commands justice, benevolence, and giving to relatives. (Stanza 7)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg dëgg, Yàlla dafa digle jub, baax, ak joxe ci say bokk. (Wers 7)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِٜجّ دِٜجّ يَٚlَّ دَفَ دِجْلِ جُبْ بَآخْ اَكْ جُخِ سِ سَيْ بُكِّ [7]

englishTranslation: So remember Allah the Great, He will remember you; and thank Him for His favors, He will increase you. (Stanza 8)
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuddeel sa Boroom mu rëy ma mu tudd la, te sant ko ci xéwal yi ngir mu yokk la. (Wers 8)

wolofTranslationStandard: Tuddeel sa Boroom mu rëy ma mu tudd la, te sant ko ci xéwal yi ngir mu yokk la. (Wers 28)
wolofalAjamiScript: تُدِّيلْ سَ بُرُومْ مُ رِي مَ مُ تُدْ لَ تِ سَنْتْ كُ سِ خِيوَلْ يِ نْجِرْ مُ يُكِّ لَ [28]

arabicText: اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ عِبَادَ اللَّهِ وَاعْلَمُوا أَنَّ الْآخِرَةَ هِيَ الدَّارُ الْبَاقِيَةُ [29]
englishTranslation: Fear Allah, O servants of Allah, and know that the Hereafter is the everlasting abode. (Stanza 29)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ragalal Yàlla yaw jami Yàlla yi, te xam ne àllaxira mooy kër gu yàgg ga. (Wers 29)
wolofalAjamiScript: رَجَلَلْ يَٚlَّ يَوْ جَمِ يَٚlَّ يِ تِ خَمْ نِ اَلَّخِرَ مُيْ كِࣺرْ جُ يَقْ جَ [29]

arabicText: وَأَقِيمُوا الصَّلَاةَ وَآتُوا الزَّكَاةَ وَتَرَاحَمُوا فِيمَا بَيْنَكُمْ [30]
latinTransliteration: Wa aqīmuṣ-ṣalāta wa ātuz-zakāta wa tarāḥamū fīmā baynakum (30)
englishTranslation: And establish prayer, give charity, and show mutual mercy among yourselves. (Stanza 30)
wolofTranslationStandard: Taxawal julli, joxe zakat, te yërmënde nekk ci seen biir sa sùnek. (Wers 30)
wolofalAjamiScript: تَخَوَلْ جُلِّ جُخِ زَكَاة تِ يِٜrْمِينْدِ نِكَّ سِ سِينْ بِيرْ سَ سُنِكْ [30]

arabicText: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَأْمُرُ بِالْعَدْلِ وَالْإِحْسَانِ وَإِيتَاءِ ذِي الْقُرْبَى [31]
latinTransliteration: Inna-llāha ya'muru bil-‘adli wal-iḥsāni wa ītā'i dhil-qurbā (31)
englishTranslation: Indeed, Allah commands justice, benevolence, and giving to relatives. (Stanza 31)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg dëgg, Yàlla dafa digle jub, baax, ak joxe ci say bokk. (Wers 31)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِٜجّ دِٜجّ يَٚlَّ دَفَ دِجْلِ جُبْ بَآخْ اَكْ جُخِ سِ سَيْ بُكِّ [31]

arabicText: فَاذْكُرُوا اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ يَذْكُرْكُمْ وَاشْكُرُوهُ عَلَى نِعَمِهِ يَزِدْكُمْ [32]
englishTranslation: So remember Allah the Great, He will remember you; and thank Him for His favors, He will increase you. (Stanza 32)
wolofTranslationStandard: Tuddeel sa Boroom mu rëy ma mu tudd la, te sant ko ci xéwal yi ngir mu yokk la. (Wers 32)
wolofalAjamiScript: تُدِّيلْ سَ بُرُومْ مُ رِي مَ مُ تُدْ لَ تِ سَنْتْ كُ سِ خِيوَلْ يِ نْجِرْ مُ يُكِّ لَ [32]

arabicText: اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ عِبَادَ اللَّهِ وَاعْلَمُوا أَنَّ الْآخِرَةَ هِيَ الدَّارُ الْبَاقِيَةُ [33]
englishTranslation: Fear Allah, O servants of Allah, and know that the Hereafter is the everlasting abode. (Stanza 33)
